Ibrahim Ismail is a Python RESTful API Developer with contact information including email (ibrahim.ismail@email.com), phone number (+20 100 123 4567), GitHub profile (github.com/ibrahim-ismail), and LinkedIn profile (linkedin.com/in/ibrahim-ismail). He has experience in Agile and SDLC methodologies.

Ibrahim Ismail has a strong background in software development, encompassing requirement gathering, customer interaction, solution design, coding, testing, and deployment. He possesses debugging and testing skills in Python and AS/400 environments, and can work both independently and in a team.
Ibrahim Ismail holds an M.Sc. in Computer Science from Pune University, as well as a B.Sc. in Computer Science from the same institution.

Ibrahim Ismail worked as a Python Developer at KPIT Technologies from July 2011 to the present, developing and supporting Python-based APIs with MongoDB/MySQL integration. He also served as a Senior AS400 and Streamserve developer for Movex/M3 ERP projects for 4 years, and as an M3 Java and Streamserve developer for 1 year.

At KPIT Technologies, Ibrahim Ismail managed the full project lifecycle, including requirement gathering, customer interaction, estimation, solution design, coding, unit testing, and deployment. He also acted as a Change Controller, managing code promotion using Pivotal Cloud Foundry (PWS).

Ibrahim Ismail has completed several internal training courses, including Python training, Web Crawling & Web Scraping, Data Science, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Django, Angular 6, HTML, CSS, Core Java, IBM I series AS/400, MOVEX ERP, M3 ERP, and Streamserve & M3 Enterprise Collaborator (MEC).

Ibrahim Ismail's skills include languages like Python, Java, RPG/400, CL/400, ILE RPG, ILE CL, and SQL/400; databases like MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, and DB2/400; frameworks and libraries like Flask, Django, Numpy, Angular 6, and RESTful APIs; and technologies like AS/400, Git, Pivotal Cloud Foundry (PWS), Streamserve, M3 Enterprise Collaborator (MEC), and Web Scraping.
Ibrahim Ismail is a native Arabic speaker, proficient in English, and has a basic level (A1) in German.

Ibrahim Ismail is a highly versatile software developer, a craftsman of digital solutions with over a decade of experience at KPIT Technologies. He’s a pragmatic problem-solver, equally comfortable architecting a complete project lifecycle – from initial requirement gathering and direct customer interaction, through meticulous solution design, to robust coding, rigorous testing, and seamless deployment – or diving deep into debugging complex systems. 

His core expertise lies in Python and RESTful API development, skillfully integrating MongoDB and MySQL databases. However, his foundation is remarkably broad, built upon a solid understanding of AS/400 environments and a history as a Senior AS400 and Streamserve developer for Movex/M3 ERP projects. He’s fluent in a diverse range of languages including Python, Java, RPG/400, and SQL, and adept with frameworks like Flask, Django, and Angular 6. 

A graduate of Pune University with an M.Sc. in Computer Science, Ibrahim isn’t content to rest on his laurels. He’s a dedicated lifelong learner, evidenced by his extensive portfolio of completed training courses spanning data science, web scraping, and cloud technologies like Pivotal Cloud Foundry (PWS). He also functions as a Change Controller, expertly managing code promotion. 

Beyond his technical prowess, Ibrahim is a globally-minded individual, a native Arabic speaker with fluency in English and a budding grasp of German. He’s readily accessible via email (ibrahim.ismail@email.com), phone (+20 100 123 4567), and online profiles on GitHub (github.com/ibrahim-ismail) and LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/ibrahim-ismail).
